ot_description: Built the unified, config-driven Requests hub covering shift, attendance, meal, OT and leave — one shell with per-type config over the existing APIs, AG Grid tables, role-driven views and pending badges. Added the attendance request detail modal with approve/reject, polished the hub's tables and modals, and fixed a 500 on pending attendance edits caused by a missing migration.

standup.name: Smit Parekh
inProgress: Requests Hub redesign — shipped to dev (PRs #56–#67); final cross-role QA on shift/attendance/meal-OT/leave
next: Clean up the duplicate out_for_work migration in the backend repo
Server-side pagination for the leave approver list if it can exceed 100 records
Optionally let approvers browse already approved/rejected attendance items in the hub

tasks.name: Requests Hub redesign (5 types, AG Grid, sidebar, role-driven views)
tasks.body: Built the unified config-driven Requests hub covering shift, attendance, meal, OT and leave.
tasks.summary:
- One RequestsView shell + per-type RequestTypeConfig; reused existing shift/attendance/meal/leave APIs (no new backend)
- AG Grid tables with toolbar search + status chips; requestLabels normalizes every status enum
- Sidebar 'Requests' parent with children + pending badges; role-driven views with My/All scope toggle for approvers
- Apply Leave modal (CL/LWP cards + balance banner); inline create for shift/leave/OT

tasks.name: Attendance detail modal + approve/reject
tasks.body: Implemented the rich attendance request detail modal and fixed approve/reject flow.
tasks.summary:
- Two-column Original vs Requested comparison (check-in/out, breaks, total hours) ported from the RN app
- Manager's Comment on approve (sent as adminRemarks); required rejection-reason modal per type
- Approver view now combines pending + approved + rejected + cancelled endpoints so actioned items move to the right filter
- Refetch list after approve/reject/cancel so the tab updates immediately

tasks.name: Requests hub UI polish
tasks.body: UI/UX pass across the requests hub tables and modals.
tasks.summary:
- Frozen table header (grid scrolls rows internally); compact status badge; narrower detail modal
- shadcn Tabs for the Meal/OT switch; consistent sm button sizes; Radix Select for dropdowns inside modals
- Whole-row click to open detail with pointer cursor; removed AG Grid cell-focus box and pinned-column line

tasks.name: Attendance pending-edit-requests 500 fix
tasks.body: Fixed the 500 on /api/attendance/pending-edit-requests caused by a missing DB migration.
tasks.summary:
- Diagnosed from the stack trace: column punchingdetail.out_for_work did not exist
- Applied the existing out_for_work columns migration to the local stage DB (local Flyway is off)
- Verified the four columns now exist and the endpoint loads
